Yes — Google Meet has built-in recording, but there are better options. Here's the breakdown:

---

## 🎥 Recording Options for Google Meet

### Option 1 — Google Meet Built-in Recording *(Limited)*
- Only available on **Google Workspace** accounts (paid Google account)
- Saves to Google Drive automatically
- Records everyone's screen/webcam
- **Limitation:** Free Google accounts cannot record

---

### Option 2 — OBS Studio + Google Meet *(Best Free Option)*
